title: DefenseClaw configuration v8
description: Canonical source schema for DefenseClaw config_version 8. Every defined configuration object is closed; extensible maps declare the schema of their values explicitly.

default_llm_api_key_env.description: Deprecated pre-v5 LLM key environment variable name retained by the existing configuration contract.

default_llm_model.description: Deprecated pre-v5 model retained by the existing configuration contract.

privacy.description: Reserved non-observability privacy section. privacy.disable_redaction is a v7 field and is intentionally rejected in v8.

retain_judge_bodies.description: Whether raw judge responses are retained in the local forensic store.

aiDiscovery.description: Existing AI discovery source controls with the retired v7 emit_otel routing switch intentionally omitted.

observability.description: Single v8 owner of collection, local retention, redaction, destinations, routing, resource attributes, trace sampling, and metric export policy.

destinations.x-defenseclaw-semantic-constraint: Destination names must be unique after canonical normalization.

customRedactionProfile.x-defenseclaw-semantic-constraint: Profile-strength and detect-with-detector requirements are enforced by the compiler. Custom profiles extend one built-in redacting profile, so inheritance cannot cycle.

connectorObservability.description: Notification-only connector compatibility. The v7 audit_sinks child is intentionally absent.

retention_days.description: Zero retains event, evidence, and judge-body history forever and requires a persistent capacity warning. The maximum is the largest whole-day period representable as a Go time.Duration.

localStore.x-defenseclaw-semantic-constraint: The two database paths must be distinct from each other and every other configured file after lexical, real-path, symlink, hard-link, and inode checks.

logger_name.description: OTel log instrumentation-scope name. Valid only when this destination selects logs.

sourcetypeOverrides.description: Maps registered audit producer keys to Splunk sourcetypes. Registration and UTF-8 byte length are compiler-validated.

max_queue_size.description: Maximum projected records retained by this destination queue.

max_queue_bytes.description: Maximum immutable projected payload bytes retained by this destination queue.

max_queue_size.description: Maximum projected records retained by this destination queue.

max_queue_bytes.description: Maximum immutable projected payload bytes retained by this destination queue.

max_export_batch_size.description: Maximum records in one outbound request.

max_export_batch_bytes.description: Hard ceiling for one fully encoded outbound request.

scheduled_delay_ms.description: Maximum normal batching delay in milliseconds.

batch.x-defenseclaw-semantic-constraint: max_export_batch_size must not exceed max_queue_size. Queue bytes count projected payloads and export batch bytes count encoded requests, so no ordering between those byte fields is inferred. Adapter and preset defaults are resolved by the compiler.

secretEnvRef.description: Explicit secret-provider reference name. Runtime resolution checks the DefenseClaw key store first, then the named environment variable; resolved bytes never enter effective configuration.

traceRoutes.x-defenseclaw-semantic-constraint: Route names must be unique within the destination.
